title: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
description: Research on intelligent systems, supervised and unsupervised learning models, predictive analytics, classification, clustering, and decision-support applications.

title: Deep Learning for Medical Image Analysis
description: Development and application of deep learning models for medical image segmentation, classification, computer-aided diagnosis, and healthcare-oriented artificial intelligence systems.

title: Federated and Semi-Supervised Learning
description: Research on privacy-preserving and data-efficient learning methods, including federated learning, semi-supervised learning, partially labeled datasets, and distributed medical image analysis.

title: Bio-Inspired and Metaheuristic Optimization
description: Design and analysis of nature-inspired optimization algorithms, including the Artificial Algae Algorithm and its variants for global optimization, constrained optimization, multi-objective optimization, feature selection, and clustering.

title: Industrial AI and Predictive Maintenance
description: Application of artificial intelligence, machine learning, and sensor-based analytics to industrial systems, adaptive control, anomaly detection, traceability, and predictive maintenance.

title: AI-Based Decision Support and Financial Planning
description: Development of AI-supported models for financial planning, cash flow prediction, supplier segmentation, prioritization, optimization, and decision-support systems.
